The unified platform

One platform for every reward model. Grow your business with a comprehensive set of customer-value tools — designed to work individually or together.

Built for scale

Enterprise infrastructure, developer ergonomics.

The plumbing that lets you process millions of rewards a day without thinking about it.

142ms median latency

Multi-region edge deployment. Reward issuance, balance lookup, and redemption never block your checkout.

SOC 2, PCI-DSS, GDPR

Audited annually. Card data tokenized at rest and in transit. Bring your own KMS keys for tier-1 compliance.

Global by default

140+ currencies. Multi-region data residency. Localized pass artwork for Apple and Google Wallet.

One unified ledger

Gift card balance, points, store credit — all reconciled in one accounting backbone. Double-entry, audit-ready.

Realtime webhooks

Subscribe to 60+ event types. At-least-once delivery, signed payloads, automatic retries with exponential backoff.

No-code rule builder

Marketing builds and ships campaigns without engineering. Visual editor compiles to the same engine your devs use.

Why teams switch

One vendor instead of four.

For developers

Built like you'd build it yourself.

Idempotent endpoints. Predictable errors. SDKs in seven languages. Sandbox parity. The kind of API you actually want to integrate.

SDKs in 7 languages

Node, Python, Go, Ruby, PHP, Java, .NET. Plus Shopify, Salesforce Commerce, and BigCommerce plugins.

Sandbox = production

Test environment is byte-identical to live. Same latency profile. Same webhook timing. Test wallet passes on real devices.

Versioning that respects your time

API versions are date-pinned. Breaking changes never auto-apply. 18-month deprecation windows, minimum.

# Issue a $50 branded eGift, push to wallet, log to ledger curl https://api.99minds.com/v1/gift_cards \ -u sk_live_•••: \ -H "99minds-Version: 2026-04-01" \ -d amount=5000 \ -d currency=usd \ -d recipient_email=ada@example.com \ -d design=brand_default \ -d wallet_pass=true # → 201 Created "id": "gc_8KPq2x9LmZ", "amount": 5000, "currency": "usd", "status": "active", "wallet_pass_url": "https://w.99m.co/p/8K...", "created": 1746230400
Industries

Purpose-built playbooks for your category.

Retail & DTC

Holiday gifting peaks, BFCM scale, returns-as-credit, omnichannel redemption.

Explore retail →

Restaurants & QSR

Stored value cards, visit-based loyalty, location-aware promos, kitchen integrations.

Explore F&B →

Travel & Hospitality

Multi-property stored value, miles ↔ points exchange, loyalty pass for the wallet.

Explore travel →

Banking & Fintech

Card-linked offers, cashback rails, debit rewards programs, regulated-grade audit logs.

Explore fintech →
